place: Chaweng Noi, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Two-Bedroom Sea-View Infinity Pool Villa in Chaweng Noi
blurb: A architectural two-bedroom villa on a Chaweng Noi hillside, offered freehold on a Chanote title — an infinity pool spilling toward the sea, arched roofs and full-height glass framing the coast and the green valley below. ฿10,990,000.
detail:
Perched on a hillside above Chaweng Noi on Koh Samui's south-east coast, this distinctive two-bedroom villa is offered freehold on a Chanote title. Sculptural arched roofs and full-height glass open the whole home to a panorama of green valley, hills and the sea beyond, with an infinity pool that appears to spill toward the horizon.

Inside, an open kitchen and living-dining space sit under vaulted ceilings, opening onto the pool terrace. Two double bedrooms — one in warm terracotta tones, one in cool blues — each have an en-suite bathroom and their own framed view, with air-conditioning throughout and full furnishing.

The infinity pool and sun terrace make the most of the elevated setting and the sunsets over the valley. Offered freehold on a Chanote title; title documents, floor plan and inventory on request.
